g.text: Lock-Free SPSC Ring Buffer (Kernel Bypass Architecture)

ol.li: Store: Write packet info to desc[head].
Load: Read packet info from desc[tail].

ul.li: L1 Cache Separation: head (CL0) and tail (CL1) are isolated by 60-byte padding to prevent False Sharing and unnecessary RFO (Request For Ownership) traffic.
Memory Barrier: Acquire/Release semantics ensure descriptors are visible to Consumer before head update.
Descriptor Alignment: 16-byte descriptors ensure no descriptor spans across two cache lines.
